type.description: Type of this refund. Can de REFUND or CHARGEBACK

sub_type.description: The sub type of this refund indicating whether the chargeback will be FULL or PARTIAL.

category.description: The category of the refund, required for chargeback.

reason.description: The reason of the refund. Can be REFUND_EXPIRED_TRANSACTION, REFUND_REQUESTED, REFUND_MERCHANT, REFUND_CHARGEBACK.

attachment.description: The Attachments to attach to the refund request.

terms_and_conditions.description: Proof that the user acknowledged the terms and conditions for chargebacks.

created.description: The timestamp of the refund's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the refund's last update.

label_user_creator.description: The label of the user who created this note.

status.description: The status of the refunded mastercard action. Can be AUTO_APPROVED, AUTO_APPROVED_WAITING_FOR_EXPIRY, PENDING_APPROVAL, APPROVED, REFUNDED, DENIED or FAILED

reference_mastercard_action_event.description: The reference to the object this refund applies to.

mastercard_action_id.description: The id of mastercard action being refunded.

alias.description: The monetary account label of the account that this action is created for.

counterparty_alias.description: The monetary account label of the counterparty.

description.description: The description for this transaction to display.

time_refund.description: The time the refund will take place.

additional_information.description: All additional information provided by the user.

status_description.description: Description of the refund's current status.

status_description_translated.description: Description of the refund's current status, translated in user's language.

status_together_url.description: Together topic concerning the refund's current status.
